page: Microsoft Azure DC16eds_v6 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCEDV6 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 Intel processor architecture. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per virtual core.

For local storage requirements, the DC16eds_v6 includes a bundled local disk with a capacity of 945 GB and is premium storage capable. The instance does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is designed to balance processing power with local storage capacity, making it suitable for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources and fast local disk access.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the inclusion of a 945 GB local disk alongside dedicated Intel vCPUs offers a consolidated resource profile for database and general-purpose workloads, eliminating the immediate need for external storage attachments for temporary data. Appropriate workloads for this configuration include relational databases, local caching tiers, and general-purpose enterprise applications that benefit from dedicated virtual cores and local storage.
description: Microsoft Azure DC16eds_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the DCEDV6 family, powered by 16 dedicated Intel vCPUs and running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes 945 GB of bundled local storage with Premium Storage capability. The instance does not feature any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This balanced allocation of dedicated compute resources and substantial local storage capacity makes the DC16eds_v6 highly suitable for database operations, enterprise applications, and general-purpose workloads requiring consistent CPU performance and local disk space.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC16eds_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine featuring 16 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 64 GB of RAM, and 945 GB of local storage, optimized for database and general-purpose workloads.

tagline: An x86_64 virtual machine featuring sixteen dedicated cores, sixty-four gigabytes of memory, and a bundled nine-hundred-forty-five gigabyte local disk.
